text:
, vo bramhaya
73
Aghori.it

MAHAVIDYA
The Divine Mother is worshipped as ten cosmic personalities,
the Dasa-Mahavidya. The Mahavidyas are considered Tantric in
nature and are usually identified as:
1. Kali: The ultimate form of Brahman, "Devourer of
Time".
74
Aghori.it

2. Tara: The Goddess as Guide and Protector, or Who
Saves. Who offers the ultimate knowledge which gives
salvation (also known as Neel Saraswati).
75
Aghori.it

3. Shodashi or Lalita Tripurasundari: The Goddess Who
is "Beautiful in the Three Worlds"; the "Tantric Parvati"
or the "Moksha Mukta".
76
Aghori.it

4. Bhuvaneshvari: The Goddess as World Mother, or
whose body is the cosmos.
77
Aghori.it

5. Bhairavi: The Fierce Goddess.
78
Aghori.it

6. Chinnamasta: The self-decapitated Goddess.
79
Aghori.it

7. Dhumavati: The Widow Goddess, or the Goddess of
death.
80
Aghori.it

8. Bagalamukhi: The Goddess who paralyzes enemies.
81
Aghori.it

9. Matangi: The Prime Minister of Lalita; the "Tantric
Saraswati".
82
Aghori.it

10.
